Unswerving Hammer of Faith  

Description

1: Summon Pet: PCPetClrS11L054Hammer

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 175 Skill: Conjuration
Casting Time: 0.5 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 0
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Deletable: No Blockable: Yes
Focusable: Yes Dispellable: Yes
Interruptable: Yes Target Type: Self
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Game Description

Summons a magical hammer that attacks your target relentlessly until either the hammer or the target dies.

Items with this effect

  • Greaves of Vengeful Fury
  • Spell: Unswerving Hammer

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Unswerving Hammer
ClassLevel
CLR54
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (48)
  • Sold By (1)
  • Quested (2)
  • Screenshots
Add Image
  • Cleric Spells (Evil Version)
  • Cleric Spells (Good Version)
« Previous 1 2 Next »
Post Comment
where is this spell?
QuoteReply
# Apr 27 2007 at 10:16 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1641773888680
View User Forum
64 posts
maybe it has already been posted, but can someone tell me where this spell is located? or if there is a quest to it? would really appreciate it as well as the other clerics in my guild!!!
▲ Page top
where is this spell?
QuoteReply
# Apr 27 2007 at 12:40 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1600647551928
Scholar
1,352 posts
follow the links, it tells you.

Quote:
Items with this effect:

* Greaves of Vengeful Fury
* Spell: Unswerving Hammer


click that link and ..

Quote:
This item is the result of a quest.
# Cleric Spells (Evil Version)
# Cleric Spells (Good Version)

Found in:

* Old Sebilis
* Skyfire Mountains


so it's a result of a quest, and a mob drop too.

Edited, Apr 27th 2007 1:40pm by DukeLatan
▲ Page top
Attacked.
QuoteReply
# Apr 03 2007 at 7:02 PM Rating: Decent
missjackie
View User Forum
1,073 posts
Be sure not to cast this spell, while in the standing next to Frist Furtun. He will attack you if you cast the hammer.
____________________________
EQ1: Gooshy: http://eq.magelo.com/profile/1870652
EQ2: Gwenythe: http://u.eq2wire.com/soe/character_detail/468152233422
▲ Page top
Usefullness
QuoteReply
# Dec 04 2006 at 6:14 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1614557966139
View User Forum
Scholar
31 posts
There is a trick to the usefulness of this hammer. It's been a long time since I used it, so I don't remember the stats. But at any rate, here's how you use it. Once you cast it, a hammer appears, it will attack anything that has hit you. Problem is, once you kill that mob, pet hammer disappears. You have to cast another for the next mob. There is a way around this. Before the mob you are killing dies, pull the next and make sure it hits you at least once, then your pet hammer will move from the dead mob to the new one without dissappaiting. My hubby and I did this on spiders in Velk's. We would pull, fight, I would use my cleric to pull the next when one got down to about 20, I would let the next hit me, then root it and get out of range. As soon as hubby and my pet hammer finished the first, my hammer moved to the second. It is important to make sure you, the cleric, get hit before you root. Unless a mob has hit you, your hammer will dissapaite and you will have to cast another.
▲ Page top
FV ain't the FV that I used to know
QuoteReply
# Jan 23 2006 at 8:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592346263366
View User Forum
56 posts
Um...okay, haven't played in awhile and i went to FV for turn in's and there are a bunch of nasty golems and dragoon's that have taken FV over. what gives and how the hell and I'm supposed to get this spell?


Good People can turn in spells to Frist Furtun in Firiona Vie and evils turn in to Brinaa Darkpact in The Overthere. Turn in:

RE: FV ain't the FV that I used to know
QuoteReply
# May 08 2006 at 2:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1612138626376
Scholar
109 posts
Hmmm, I thought it was east side of zone but could be wrong. Anyway, when you exit the tunnels from the PoK book head straight ahead. It's on the island looking thing that Glorious described. There will be 2 guards standing out front of some ruins of an old Drolvorg fort & vendors are in the back.

▲ Page top
Who to turn spells into and where.
QuoteReply
# Oct 23 2005 at 4:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591791385245
Scholar
49 posts
Good People can turn in spells to Frist Furtun in Firiona Vie and evils turn in to Brinaa Darkpact in The Overthere. Turn in:

Spell: Death Pact
Spell: Reckoning
Spell: Upheaval
Spell: Yaulp IV

to get

Spell: Heroic Bond
Spell: Sunskin
Spell: Unswerving Hammer
Spell: Word of Vigor

Hope this helps
▲ Page top
pet
QuoteReply
# Nov 10 2004 at 4:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592763806772
346 posts
this is great spell. he hits harder then nec pets up to 59, and is completly expendable, if he dies no worry at all, make another one.

he cannot take any hits at all, but you ussualy dont' have to worry about that. in a group to have tank, and soloing you'll be taking it for him. but just remember not to try and save him if hes going to get killed, let him poof and summon new one. casts fast and cheap

I got this spell by doing the turn in. you can buy reckoning out of bazaar ussualy for around 100p, buy several and do turn in. the hammer pet sells for 1k here, so wouldnt buy it directly.

▲ Page top
RE: pet

# Dec 08 2005 at 6:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591801678987
344 posts

Long lived hammer
QuoteReply
# Oct 28 2004 at 1:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593363550785
1 post
Usualy the hammer kills the mob returns to me and then despawn, but today he managed to kill the wooly mammoth, return and slay the snow leopard that was trying to kill me.

I love this spell!
▲ Page top
RE: Long lived hammer
QuoteReply
# Oct 28 2004 at 3:22 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Hammer will stick around as long as a mob is attacking you. What works ok, if youare equipped well enough to do it, is just chain pulling, before the previous mob dies, so you get hit and the hammer sticks around.
▲ Page top
Wonderful, Wonderful Pet
QuoteReply
# Sep 21 2004 at 5:37 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256073107
Scholar
21 posts
I'm posting this shortly after OOW release.

Now that the Temperance line no longer costs a DoT, this pet is amazing for lower level farming (i.e. Pickclaws for Fine Steel).

I can also solo in the PoJ with this by casting Temp and AotF on myself, single pull to ZO, then casting my pet. I keep agro off my pet by standing next to the mob (having a horse helps) and then CHing myself when needed. Even without any mana regen buffs and 180-some Wisdom I will use maybe 10% of my pool in a fight. With mana regen, I could even help by nuking or whatnot.

It takes a while to fall a Sentry, but it will be excellent actually being able to solo something DB to me as a cleric. It's just beautiful. It's also an excellent way to raise your defense if it is not capped for you. And a little defense goes a long way in AC.
▲ Page top

My luck sucks
QuoteReply
# May 26 2004 at 8:42 PM Rating: Default
vashra
Scholar
316 posts
Am I just cursed?

So far I've turned in (in no particular order)

8 copies of yaulp IV
6 copies of death pact
4 copies of upheaval
2 copies of reckoning

One time I even waited and turned in one of each spell - all at the same time.

My results?

3 word of vigor
2 heroic bond or heroism or whatever it was
and more copies of sunskin than I can shake a stick at :(

Someone said they sold this for 4k on their server. I've never seen it on Mith Maar for less than 10k.

Does ANYTHING drop this spell or is the only way I can hope to get it to keep feeding this dorf my copies of the four spells he wants?

Not liking the ratio on this at ALL.

From the December 18 patch message:

Quote:
- Fixed a problem with short-duration pets (Rage of Zomm, cleric hammers, wizard flaming swords and such) so that they will no longer dissipate before engaging the target NPC.



That hammer was broken for 2-3 months. Did you just ding 54, or did you take a vaction from the game?

When I compare my results with the others posted, it seems the turn-in quest spells are indeed totally random, but I will post my results anyway, as I just completed it this morning: (Turned in --> Got back)
Upheaval --> Sunskin, Upheaval --> Sunskin, Reckoning --> Heroic Bond, Yaulp IV --> Unswerving Hammer of Faith.

View User Forum
11 posts
as of today nov 5, 2003 this spell is BROKEN... pet hammer will NOT attack anything unless you are struck by an enemy (like enchie pet) therefor pet despawns between 1-5 seconds after cast. Worked fine yesterday so it must be assumed that the patch last nite broke it...

itsa bummer too cuz i like mah pet hammer

Trassen Reapersbane
▲ Page top
RE: broken
QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2003 at 8:53 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595175418420
5 posts
Slyknot, I'm with you on that this is a bummer. I loved to see my hammer dance of into battle and start adding damage along with the rest of the melee. Now, I consider it fortunate to be able to cast this spell and then have the mob whomp on me so the pet doesn't 'poof'. Nothing like getting whomped on and taking three casts and mana drain to get the pet to stick. I have submitted a bug report to Sony and hope the rest of the clerics do also. I also hope this is a bug and not a feature as most of the spells in level 50, especially since temperance came out, useless.
▲ Page top
Pet Life
QuoteReply
# Oct 15 2003 at 6:05 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760701855
4 posts
Until now I was under the impression that no matter what the pet would die after the mob dies. I found that not to be true. I was soloing, I rooted a mob cast my pet and it attacked it. While my pet was on the mob I started attacking another mob. When the mob that my pet was on died, my pet came to my aid on the other mob. I then went to another mob and again after my pet killed its mob he came to my aid. So I guess as long as you have aggro your pet will help you out. I had to cel heal it once or twice but other then that it did good.
▲ Page top
soloing with pet
QuoteReply
# Oct 11 2003 at 11:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595175418420
5 posts
I tried something fun with the pet. I went to KC and grabbed a single dog pull. As I took agro I casted my pet. Then I casted temperance on my pet, ( To expensive in the long run, I used heroism after that ). Then I rooted the mob and backed off casting celestial heal on my pet as needed. As an extra buff to my pet I cast frenzied strength on my pet. I was able to solo the dog doing this with kei and used only 50 percent of my mana. I'm trying different tactics for fun... Stun, blind, step in and take a bit of beating myself and add some dps, etc. etc. It's a nice change from grouping at times.
▲ Page top

▲ Page top
Solin HG's
QuoteReply
# Aug 17 2003 at 2:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591789121350
1 post
First off, for you cleric's who neeed peridot money like me, this thing is a savior.

I pull with retribution, then root, then cast Celestial heal on myself. I pull out my weapon, cast pet and begin melee.

If your 54+ cleric, you should have about 850+ ac and 2khp when buffed. At the end of the fight, (with a C3) most of my mana has regened and I have about 50% life left...and an extra 30pp.

This hammer hits consistent, don't disregard it if you don't have a good DPSer
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Jul 28 2003 at 9:21 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592759750075
View User Forum
Scholar
210 posts
The cleric spell quest in FV. Turn in Upheaval, Reckoning, Deathpact or Yaulp 4 and you have a chance of getting this, Sunskin, Word of Vigor or Heroic Bond. NPC is Frist Furton. The exact same quest is run out of the OT outpost, don't have that NPC's name handy atm though. Good Luck!

As I said, you have a chance of getting THIS, Sunskin, Word of Vigor or Heroic Bond. So THIS is one of the spells you get from the quest =p. Sheesh.
▲ Page top
useful
QuoteReply
# May 19 2003 at 9:59 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Useful in the right situation. Was grinding in velks, and half the group left, leaving cleric, chanter and 1 warrior. With the full group, them mobs dropped fast. With only one tank, they were taking forever. The hammer pet was hitting for 70s per hit, and often double attacked. Mobs were going down much faster, and pet did more damage per mob than a single retribution would, for the same mana. Even had the hammer and the chanter's shield fighting one mob, while the warrior tanked another. that was pretty funny. chanter shield, buffed, tanked ok, and hammer dps helped a lot.

BTW AOE mezz kills the hammer pet, even if the targetted mob is only mezzed for a second.
▲ Page top
